scripts.build: pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/accent-ir build && pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/analyze-contract build && pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/tts-playground build && pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/analyze-backend build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/analyze-contract lint && pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/tts-playground lint && pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/analyze-backend lint
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/accent-ir type-check && pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/analyze-contract type-check && pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/tts-playground type-check && pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/analyze-backend type-check
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/accent-ir clean && pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/analyze-contract clean && pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/tts-playground clean && pnpm --filter @japanese-tts-analyzer/analyze-backend clean
